title: Gold notebook correctness cleanups — initcap-dead material mappings, Phosphorus/Phosphorous dup, fact_supply_share double-write, misleading coverage matrix, EPI year hardcodes
description: Bundle of smaller silver-to-gold2 (and bronze_ingest_epi) correctness issues. (A) Materials are F.initcap()'d BEFORE the alias join, and Spark initcap lowercases every non-word-initial letter (including after '(' and '-'), so grp_map keys 'Steel (High-Tensile)', 'Plastic (Abs)', 'Rare Earths (Ndpr)' can never match — those materials silently classify as Other/Unknown — and the 'STEEL (High-Tensile)'/'steel (high-tensile)' alias rows can never fire. Telling detail: 'Electronics (controllers, Sensors)' and 'Tires (rubber Compound)' were already hand-tuned to initcap's output, so this bug was hit before and only two keys were fixed. (B) grp_map carries both 'Phosphorus' and 'Phosphorous' as separate standards with no alias linking them — both spellings would enter dim_material as distinct materials (alias_mappings.md says the alias should exist). (C) fact_supply_share is written twice per run — a clean version (drops unmapped) at line 1046, overwritten by the placeholder-mapped version at line 1363 — wasted compute, a DirectLake window where the intermediate table is readable, and the two versions treat '<1%' differently (1.0 vs 0.5; the 0.5 version wins). (D) gold_country_coverage_matrix ships a coverage_category computed from EPI presence ALONE (code admits 'simplified for brevity') — misleading to any consumer. (E) bronze_ingest_epi hardcodes target table bronze_epi2024results regardless of p_epi_year, and fact_epi_score hardcodes year=2024 — a future-year pull would overwrite 2024 data under a 2024-named table.
acceptanceCriteria: Material normalization is made consistent: either normalize grp_map keys and alias entries to initcap-canonical form (verify each key is reachable: initcap(key)==key), or switch matching to a case-insensitive join (lower() both sides) so casing can never silently kill a mapping again. After /run-gold, 'Steel (high-tensile)'-family materials carry commodity_group='Manufactured products', not 'Other/Unknown'.
A guard exists (unit test in tests/ or in-notebook assertion) that every grp_map key and every alias LHS is reachable from initcap-normalized input — dead keys fail loudly.
Phosphorus/Phosphorous unified: alias added ('Phosphorus' -> 'Phosphorous' per alias_mappings.md:43, or the reverse — pick one canonical spelling) and only one enters dim_material.

fact_supply_share is written exactly once per run (delete or refactor the first write path at silver-to-gold2:1016-1047; the enhanced version at 1190-1363 is the keeper). '<1%' handling is single-sourced (0.5 midpoint estimate) and commented.

gold_country_coverage_matrix either implements real multi-source coverage (EPI + supply + procurement HQ/prod presence as designed at lines 506-562) or is dropped/renamed to something honest (e.g. epi_presence) — no more 'High/Medium/Low Coverage' labels derived from one source.

bronze_ingest_epi derives the target table name from p_epi_year (or documents/asserts that only 2024 is supported and fails loudly on other years); fact_epi_score's year literal follows the same parameter instead of a hardcoded 2024.
[Erik/Fabric] /run-gold after changes; spot-check dim_material commodity groups and the report's supply-share visuals.
notes: AUDIT-DERIVED (pipeline quality audit 2026-07-13): findings #12, #19, #20 + alias_mappings phosphorus gap + EPI year hardcode. Not spec-decomposed — empty drift fingerprints.

EVIDENCE (A): initcap applied at silver-to-gold2:594-599 (proc/sup material) and 1017/1197; alias join against post-initcap values at 609-611; dead alias rows at 195-196; dead grp_map keys at 653 ('Rare Earths (Ndpr)'), 672 ('Plastic (Abs)'), 674 ('Steel (High-Tensile)'); hand-tuned survivors at 671 and 673. CAVEAT: initcap behavior verified from Spark semantics (first letter of whitespace-delimited word uppercased, rest lowercased), not executed — the reachability guard in acceptance turns this from belief into test.
EVIDENCE (B): grp_map has 'Phosphorus' (line 665) and 'Phosphorous' (line 694) as separate keys; no alias links the spellings; alias_mappings.md:41-43 documents the intended alias.

EVIDENCE (C): first write_tbl(fact_supply_share_clean,...) at line 1046 with regexp-based share parse ('<1%' -> 1.0) at 1020; second write_tbl(fact_supply_share_final,...) at 1363 with '<' -> 0.5 at 1200-1205.
EVIDENCE (D): create_country_coverage_matrix at lines 506-564 — has_epi only, coverage_score = has_epi/1.0, comment 'Simplified for brevity - would repeat pattern for each source'.

EVIDENCE (E): table_name = 'bronze_epi2024results' hardcoded at bronze_ingest_epi:152 while URL uses p_epi_year (line 80); year literal 2024 at silver-to-gold2:981. Also note bronze_ingest_epi validates plain column names (code/iso/country/EPI, line 136) while bronze-to-silver's clean_and_rename handles .new/.old suffixes (lines 91-102) — written against different CSV shapes; harmonize or comment while in there.
COORDINATE: same file as tasks 023/025/027 — serialize with them (files_affected overlap prevents parallel dispatch anyway).

DEAD WRITE found 2026-07-22 while implementing the territory rollup: fact_supply_share is written TWICE in silver-to-gold2 — write_tbl(fact_supply_share_clean, 'fact_supply_share') at ~:1146 and write_tbl(fact_supply_share_final, 'fact_supply_share') at ~:1500. The second overwrites the first, so the entire first construction (the fact_supply_share / fact_supply_share_clean path around :1124-1147, including its check_unmapped calls and its 'Retained N of M records' print) is dead work whose output never survives. It also emits misleading console output during every run. Candidate cleanup for this task; verify the check_unmapped side effects are genuinely duplicated by the :1351+ path before deleting.

DECISIONS RECORDED 2026-07-23 (implement-agent, both within an AC that explicitly permitted either branch; verify-agent independently assessed the first as sound and contained). (1) gold_country_coverage_matrix: implemented real multi-source coverage rather than renaming to epi_presence. Rationale: all four source country-sets were already computed in the function, the alias-aware join pattern already existed, and the table sits in the semantic model's PBI_RemovedChildren list so there were zero TMDL/DAX consumers to sweep. Renaming would also have preserved the always-1 has_epi bug under an honest name. (2) Phosphorus/Phosphorous: chose 'Phosphorus' -> 'Phosphorous' per alias_mappings.md:44, matching the existing Aluminum -> Aluminium precedent (non-US form canonical); avoids editing alias_mappings.md and business_rules.md, and both spellings map to 'Chemicals' so the collapse is lossless.

verification_history.summary: AC1-AC6 verified by EXECUTING the DataFrame layer in a local[1] Spark session against baseline 68fbc17, not by reasoning. Reachability re-derived over all 66 grp_map keys + all aliases on both revisions (old: 3 dead alias LHS; new: 0). Losslessness of the 3 removed aliases proven end-to-end over 14 raw spellings - old and new (material_name_std, commodity_group) identical for all 13 non-Phosphorus inputs. The has_epi always-1 defect confirmed by running the PRE-change code verbatim: a country in no source still returned has_epi=1 / 'High Coverage'. AC4: exactly one write_tbl(fact_supply_share) survives, deleted variables have no surviving readers (positive controls run), '<1%' single-sourced at 0.5. Fabric CELL/MARKDOWN/METADATA marker invariant audited and intact; MARKDOWN->MARKDOWN adjacency has precedent in the deployed bronze-to-silver notebook. Scope clean: no hunk reaches the task-027 registry code (line 2288+) and BLOCKING_CHECKS lives in an untouched notebook. 94/94 pytest pass. AC5 design choice (real coverage over rename) assessed sound and contained - table is in the semantic model's PBI_RemovedChildren with no .tmdl, no DAX/warehouse consumers, all confirmed with positive controls.

issues.description: AC6 met in spirit not literally: silver-to-gold2 has no p_epi_year parameter, so EPI_YEAR is a module constant; bronze-to-silver.Notebook still hardcodes bronze_epi2024results/silver_epi2024results, so the year is parameterized at both ends and hardcoded in the middle. Residual failure mode is safe (fails loudly) rather than the silent mislabeling AC6 targeted.

check_unmapped() now has no production callsite in silver-to-gold2, so tests/test_data_quality.py's parity assertion guards a function the pipeline never executes. Retention is deliberate (documented in docstring) but the contract no longer guards live behavior.

The new Phosphorus->Phosphorous alias extends the pre-existing nondeterministic dropDuplicates(material_name_std) at silver-to-gold2:773 - match_confidence for Phosphorous is arbitrarily 0.95 or 1.0 run to run. Inherited pattern (identical to Aluminum/Aluminium), not a new defect.

test_protocol.summary: AC7 (Erik/Fabric): run the gold layer and spot-check what only real lakehouse data can show.

steps.instruction: Run /run-gold in Fabric; watch for the new reachability guard line.
steps.expected: 'Material mapping reachability: N keys/aliases, 0 unreachable' prints and no AssertionError.

steps.instruction: SELECT material_name_std, commodity_group FROM oem_lh.gold_dim_material WHERE material_name_std IN ('Steel (high-tensile)','Plastic (abs)','Rare Earths (ndpr)','Electronics (controllers, Sensors)')
SELECT material_name_std FROM oem_lh.gold_dim_material WHERE material_name_std LIKE 'Phosphor%'
SELECT coverage_category, COUNT(*) FROM oem_lh.gold_country_coverage_matrix GROUP BY coverage_category
steps.expected: More than one category. If every country is still 'High Coverage', the rewrite did not take effect - that was the old symptom.

steps.instruction: Search the run log for lines naming oem_lh.fact_supply_share.
steps.expected: Exactly one write line, and no 'Retained N of M records' (that belonged to the deleted duplicate build).

steps.instruction: Spot-check the Power BI supply-share visuals and commodity-group breakdown.
steps.expected: Supply-share totals unchanged vs the previous run; no unexpected shift into/out of 'Other/Unknown'.
